channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - RAG & Retrieval
channel.description: Latest RAG & Retrieval news in Context Engineering

item.title: CL-bench Life: Can Language Models Learn from Real-Life Context?
item.description: arXiv:2604.27043v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Today's AI assistants such as OpenClaw are designed to handle context effectively, making context learning an increasingly important capability for models. As these systems move beyond professional settings into everyday life, the nature of the contex...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, RAG, context, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Compositional Meta-Learning for Mitigating Task Heterogeneity in Physics-Informed Neural Networks
item.description: arXiv:2604.26999v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) approximate solutions of partial differential equations (PDEs) by embedding physical laws into the loss function. In parameterized PDE families, variations in coefficients or boundary/initial conditions define ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> framework, arxiv, embedding, model, RAG | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Think it, Run it: Autonomous ML pipeline generation via self-healing multi-agent AI
item.description: arXiv:2604.27096v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The purpose of our paper is to develop a unified multi-agent architecture that automates end-to-end machine learning (ML) pipeline generation from datasets and natural-language (NL) goals, improving efficiency, robustness and explainability. A five-ag...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, large language model, study, LLM, paper | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Fidelity, Diversity, and Privacy: A Multi-Dimensional LLM Evaluation for Clinical Data Augmentation
item.description: arXiv:2604.27014v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The scarcity of high-quality annotated medical data, particularly in mental health, poses a significant bottleneck for training robust machine learning models. Privacy regulations restrict data sharing, making synthetic data generation a promising alt...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> framework, arxiv, large language model, vision, LLM | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: airweave - Open-source context retrieval layer for AI agents
item.description: Open-source context retrieval layer for AI agents<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, retrieval | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: LightRAG - [EMNLP2025] "LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation"
item.description: [EMNLP2025] "LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation"<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> RAG, augmented, retrieval | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: KAG - KAG is a logical form-guided reasoning and retrieval framework based on OpenSPG engine and LLMs. It is used to build logical reasoning and factual Q&A solutions for professional domain knowledge bases. It can effectively overcome the shortcomings of the traditional RAG vector similarity calculation model.
item.description: KAG is a logical form-guided reasoning and retrieval framework based on OpenSPG engine and LLMs. It is used to build logical reasoning and factual Q&A solutions for professional domain knowledge bases. It can effectively overcome the shortcomings of the traditional RAG vector similarity calculation model.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> framework, reasoning, LLM, vector, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Kiln - Build, Evaluate, and Optimize AI Systems. Includes evals, RAG, agents, fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, dataset management, MCP, and more.
item.description: Build, Evaluate, and Optimize AI Systems. Includes evals, RAG, agents, fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, dataset management, MCP, and more.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> RAG, fine-tuning | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: graphrag - A modular graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system
item.description: A modular graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> RAG, augmented, retrieval | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>

item.title: R2R - SoTA production-ready AI retrieval system. Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with a RESTful API.
item.description: SoTA production-ready AI retrieval system. Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with a RESTful API.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> product, API, RAG, augmented, retrieval | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
